knowl:
Two forces act on a single point.
Force X has a magnitude of {{F1}} pounds and force Y has a magnitude of {{F2}} pounds. The angle between the two forces is {{theta}}^\circ.
(a) Find the magnitude of the resultant.
(b) Find the angle between the resultant and the {{F1}}-pound force.
Round answers to the nearest tenth.
{{{outtro}}}
